integrator_instructions.copy_layout: Place the following files at the same directory level as index.html: rules-engine.js (from output/builders/rules-engine/builder-rules-engine-b1/output.js), ai-opponent.js (from output/builders/ai-opponent/builder-ai-opponent-b1/output.js), ui-render.js (from output/builders/ui-render/builder-ui-render-b1/output.js), ui-render.css (from output/builders/ui-render/builder-ui-render-b2/output.css), controller.js (this builder), index.html (this builder).
integrator_instructions.no_build_step: Open index.html directly in a modern browser via file:// or any static server.

contract_compliance.rules-engine--controller-and-shell.json: consumes createBoard, applyMove (try/catch wrapped per documented error contract), checkOutcome.
contract_compliance.ai-opponent--controller-and-shell.json: calls AIOpponent.chooseMove only when state.currentPlayer == 'O' and outcome.status == 'in_progress'; controller owns the perceptual delay.
contract_compliance.ui-render--controller-and-shell.json: controller is the only writer; renderer is the only DOM toucher; viewModel composed each frame from state + outcome.

notes: Restart cancels any pending AI setTimeout to avoid stale moves on a fresh board.
Defensive checks in click handler ignore clicks during AI's turn or after game-over (acceptance: graceful illegal-input handling).
DOMContentLoaded gating allows index.html to keep scripts at the end of body OR move them to head later without breaking init.
